# Account Feature Shadow Spec

> Account Management - Foundation for financial tracking with spending pool designation

**Status:** Planned
**Generated by:** spec-lead + @pseudo-worker

---

## Context Imports

```sudolang
import("specs/ARCHITECTURE.md")
import("specs/DB_DESIGN.md")
import("specs/DESIGN_SYSTEM.md")
import("specs/FEATURES.md")
import("specs/DEPENDENCIES.md")
```

---

## Architecture

```sudolang
// Package-by-Feature Structure
// src/commonMain/kotlin/com/budgetcalendar/features/accounts/
// ├── data/
// │   ├── local/           # SQLDelight queries
// │   ├── repository/      # AccountRepositoryImpl
// │   └── mapper/          # AccountMapper
// ├── domain/
// │   ├── model/           # Account, AccountType
// │   ├── repository/      # IAccountRepository
// │   └── usecase/        # CreateAccount, GetAccounts, etc.
// └── presentation/
//     ├── AccountViewModel.kt
//     └── AccountUiState.kt
```

---

## Data Model

```sudolang
// Domain Models
interface Account {
  id: Long;
  name: String;
  type: AccountType;
  balance: Long;           // In cents
  isInSpendingPool: Boolean;
  createdAt: Long;         // Unix timestamp ms
  updatedAt: Long;
}

enum AccountType {
  CHECKING = "checking"
  SAVINGS = "savings"
  CREDIT_CARD = "credit_card"
  CASH = "cash"
  INVESTMENT = "investment"
}

interface CreateAccountRequest {
  name: String;
  type: AccountType;
  initialBalance: Long;
  isInSpendingPool: Boolean;
}

interface UpdateAccountRequest {
  name: String?;
  type: AccountType?;
  balance: Long?;
  isInSpendingPool: Boolean?;
}

// UI State Models
interface AccountUiState {
  accounts: List<Account>;
  selectedAccount: Account?;
  isLoading: Boolean;
  error: String?;
  totalNetWorth: Long;
}
```

---

## Constraints

```sudolang
Constraint: Account name must be 1-50 characters, trimmed
Constraint: Account type must be one of: CHECKING, SAVINGS, CREDIT_CARD, CASH, INVESTMENT
Constraint: Initial balance must be between -999999999.99 and 999999999.99 (in cents)
Constraint: Asset accounts (non-CC) cannot have negative initial balance
Constraint: Credit Card accounts display as liabilities (negative balance)
Constraint: Account deletion only allowed if no transactions reference it
Constraint: Each account must belong to a single user
Constraint: Account creation timestamp recorded automatically
```

---

## Data Flow

```sudolang
// Create Account Flow
User Input |> validateCreateAccountInput |> CreateAccountUseCase.execute()
  |> AccountRepository.insert()
  |> If (isInSpendingPool) |> RecalculateSafeToSpend
  |> Return Account
  |> Update AccountUiState

// Delete Account Flow
User Request |> CheckTransactionCount |> If 0
  |> AccountRepository.delete()
  |> If (wasInSpendingPool) |> RecalculateSafeToSpend
  |> Return Success

// Get Accounts Flow
User Request |> GetAccountsUseCase.execute()
  |> AccountRepository.getAll()
  |> Map to AccountUiState
  |> Emit Flow<AccountUiState>
```

---

## Function Signatures

```sudolang
fn CreateAccount(ctx: Context, req: CreateAccountRequest): Result<Account>
fn GetAccounts(ctx: Context): Flow<List<Account>>
fn GetAccountById(ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<Account>
fn UpdateAccount(ctx: Context, id: Long, req: UpdateAccountRequest): Result<Account>
fn DeleteAccount(ctx: Context, id: Long): Result<void>
fn GetSpendingPoolAccounts(ctx: Context): Flow<List<Account>>
fn GetTotalSpendingPoolBalance(ctx: Context): Result<Long>
fn CalculateNetWorth(ctx: Context): Result<Long>
```

## UI Components

```sudolang
// AccountCard Props
interface AccountCardProps {
  account: Account;
  balance: Long;
  onTap: () -> Unit;
  onLongPress: () -> Unit;
}

// AccountList Props
interface AccountListProps {
  accounts: List<Account>;
  balances: Map<Long, Long>;
  onAccountTap: (Account) -> Unit;
  onAddAccount: () -> Unit;
}

// AccountForm Props
interface AccountFormProps {
  initialData: Account?;
  onSave: (CreateAccountRequest) -> Unit;
  onCancel: () -> Unit;
  onDelete: (Account) -> Unit?;
}
```

---

## Database Schema

```sudolang
table accounts {
  id: Long PK AUTOINCREMENT
  name: Text NOT NULL
  type: Text NOT NULL CHECK(type IN ('checking','savings','credit_card','cash','investment'))
  balance: Integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
  is_in_spending_pool: Integer NOT NULL DEFAULT 0
  created_at: Integer NOT NULL
  updated_at: Integer NOT NULL
}

index idx_accounts_spending_pool ON accounts(is_in_spending_pool)
```

---

## SQLDelight Queries

```sudolang
// getAllAccounts :many
SELECT * FROM accounts ORDER BY created_at DESC;

// getAccountById :one
SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE id = :id;

// getSpendingPoolAccounts :many
SELECT * FROM accounts WHERE is_in_spending_pool = 1 ORDER BY name;

// insertAccount :one
INSERT INTO accounts (name, type, balance, is_in_spending_pool, created_at, updated_at)
VALUES (:name, :type, :balance, :is_in_spending_pool, :created_at, :updated_at)
RETURNING *;

// updateAccount :one
UPDATE accounts 
SET name = :name, type = :type, balance = :balance, 
    is_in_spending_pool = :is_in_spending_pool, updated_at = :updated_at
WHERE id = :id
RETURNING *;

// deleteAccount :exec
DELETE FROM accounts WHERE id = :id;

// getTotalSpendingPoolBalance :one
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(balance), 0) FROM accounts WHERE is_in_spending_pool = 1;
```

---

## Dependencies

```sudolang
// External Dependencies
Dependency: sqldelight (2.0.1) - Database
Dependency: koin (3.5.3) - DI
Dependency: kotlinx-coroutines (1.7.3) - Async

// Internal Dependencies
Dependency: core/database - SQLDelight queries
Dependency: features/transactions - Transaction foreign key
```

---

## Edge Cases

| Case | Condition | Handling |
|------|-----------|----------|
| Delete account with transactions | Transaction count > 0 | Return error: "Cannot delete account with existing transactions" |
| Negative initial balance for non-CC | type != CREDIT_CARD and balance < 0 | Return error: "Asset accounts cannot have negative initial balance" |
| Positive balance on Credit Card | type == CREDIT_CARD and balance > 0 | Allow, interpret as credit balance |
| Zero accounts | No accounts created | Show onboarding prompt |
| All accounts removed from pool | isInSpendingPool == false for all | Show $0.00 Safe to Spend with explanation |
